scenario.request: Write a short Telegram caption for a new USDT staking promo. Keep it punchy and crypto-native.

trace.final_text:
Got everything I need. Now I'll craft the caption and generate the image — a punchy USDT staking promo with a 3D brand asset visual.
Here's your publish-ready USDT staking promo draft:

---

**Image Preview:**
![USDT Staking Promo](https://replicate.delivery/xezq/3DE0hl307yr2J1VTnzUEWLtxoce8XgAiXhNZtg6wEmW1HkFLA/tmps_gu4vz5.png)

---

```json
{
  "caption": "Stack USDT. Earn while you hold. No perps required. 🔥",
  "alt_text": "Stack of matte amber-orange USDT coins on a black metallic platform with a glowing orange percentage symbol above, against a pure black background.",
  "image_prompt": "A stack of matte amber-orange USDT coins piled high on a matte black metallic platform, with an orange percentage symbol glowing above the stack, centered composition, pure black background #000000, no glow bleeding into background, no smoke or fog",
  "content_type": "brand_3d",
  "title": "USDT STAKING",
  "subtitle": "Earn yield on your USDT holdings. Simple, flexible, rewarding.",
  "platform": "WEB"
}
```

**Caption breakdown:**
- **"Stack USDT."** — crypto-native verb, direct
- **"Earn while you hold."** — benefit, plain and punchy
- **"No perps required."** — wink to the trading audience, signals BloFin knows its crowd
- One 🔥 at the end — brand-approved, high energy, not overdone

Let me know if you want a harder CTA (e.g. with an APY figure), a different tone, or a revised image!
